headline: Aon (AON) Valuation Check As Digital Placement Exchange Plan Targets London Market Trading Reform
summary: Aon (AON) has put digital trading at the center of its story with plans for the Aon Digital Placement Exchange, a London Market platform that uses structured data and algorithmic trading for Follow Line placements. See our latest analysis for Aon. These digital initiatives come as the stock trades at $323.66, with the share price down 5.99% year to date and a 1 year total shareholder return that is also weaker. The 5 year total shareholder return of 33.50% points to steadier long term...
